security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:*; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:*; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:*; img-src 'self' data: blob: http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:*; media-src 'self' data: blob: http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:*; font-src 'self' data:; object-src 'none'; frame-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; form-action 'none'
